$comment: Protocol-level test mappings for requirements not provable by fixtures alone

mappings.test_description: Steps MUST be performed in specified order
mappings.notes: Validation order proven by step-precedence assertions

mappings.test_description: Hard error MUST terminate validation immediately
mappings.notes: Step 1 signature fail before Step 4 schema parse

mappings.test_description: Verifier MUST NOT continue after hard error
mappings.notes: No subsequent step effects observable after hard error

mappings.test_description: Step 3 kernel constraints fail before Step 7 issuer binding
mappings.notes: Constraint violation takes precedence over issuer mismatch

mappings.test_description: Strict profile enforces recognized typ value
Warnings MUST be sorted by (pointer, code)
mappings.notes: Warning sort order verified in existing warning test suite

mappings.test_description: Warning code is REQUIRED on every VerificationWarning object
mappings.notes: All warning emissions include code field; property tests confirm structure

mappings.test_description: Warning message is REQUIRED on every VerificationWarning object
mappings.notes: All warning emissions include message field; property tests confirm structure
Property test: JOSE hardening applies regardless of strictness; coherence checked in crypto layer

mappings.test_description: Wire 0.1 route MUST NOT contain peac_version 0.2
mappings.notes: Crypto layer rejects typ=peac-receipt/0.1 with peac_version=0.2 (E_WIRE_VERSION_MISMATCH)
Crypto layer rejects typ=interaction-record+jwt without peac_version=0.2 (E_WIRE_VERSION_MISMATCH)
Schema validation rejects challenge extension without problem.type; confirmed by fixture and property test
